channel.title: Happiness on Jakob Külzer's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Happiness on Jakob Külzer's Blog

item.title: On Developer Happiness and Productivity
item.description: I’ve had the idea for this blog post in my mind for a long time. It is based on all my personal experiences and observations over the past years and is in no way scientific. It is my personal opinion, and even though this is how I perceive the world, it might not be true for other people. With that said, let’s jump to the core of things. A happy developer is a productive developer.
